metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students create substantial film and television projects demonstrating sophisticated production and directorial skills. This course emphasizes creative vision, technical mastery, and preparation for professional or advanced study in media production.
metadata.general_description: Advanced film and television production course for substantial project creation.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced filmmakers create substantial works demonstrating artistic vision, technical expertise, and sophisticated storytelling.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 producers and directors create significant projects that show maturity of vision and mastery of production craft.

big_ideas.statement: Professional film and television production demands technical excellence, creative problem-solving, and collaborative leadership.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced producers manage complex productions, coordinate technical teams, and maintain artistic vision through production challenges.

big_ideas.statement: Sophisticated media work engages with meaningful stories, diverse perspectives, and contemporary contexts.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 films and shows explore complex themes, represent diverse voices, and contribute to media discourse about important issues.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced film and television work positions students for professional careers or advanced study in media production.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students develop professional portfolios and skills necessary for work in media industries or continued education.

competencies.raw: Produce substantial film and television projects
i_can_statements: I can plan and produce substantial film or television projects
I can manage complete production from concept through final delivery
I can execute technically sophisticated projects
I can realize ambitious creative visions

competencies.raw: Develop sophisticated directorial vision and artistic approach
i_can_statements: I can develop complex artistic concepts for films and shows
I can communicate vision clearly to cast and crew
I can make bold creative choices with clear rationale
I can maintain artistic integrity through production
I can execute advanced cinematographic techniques
I can compose shots with sophistication and purpose
I can use lighting and color creatively and effectively
I can develop distinctive visual style

competencies.raw: Lead editing, post-production, and technical teams
i_can_statements: I can edit complex projects with technical and creative sophistication
I can manage post-production timelines and workflow
I can coordinate sound design, color, and effects
I can produce professional-quality final products

competencies.raw: Analyze film and television with sophisticated critical frameworks
i_can_statements: I can conduct detailed analysis of cinematography and editing
I can understand films and shows within historical and cultural contexts
I can identify themes and meanings in complex works
I can evaluate how technical choices create artistic effects

competencies.raw: Understand film and television production at professional level
i_can_statements: I can understand professional production standards and practices
I can recognize sophisticated filmmaking techniques
I can evaluate work against professional industry standards
I can understand diverse production approaches

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic growth and developing directorial vision
i_can_statements: I can articulate my artistic approach and perspective
I can evaluate how my work has developed and matured
I can identify my distinctive voice as a filmmaker
I can envision continued artistic development

competencies.raw: Engage with contemporary film and television discourse
i_can_statements: I can participate in conversations about contemporary media
I can understand current artistic movements and debates
I can position my work within broader media landscape
I can recognize diverse voices in film and television

competencies.raw: Create professional production documentation and planning
i_can_statements: I can write professional scripts and production notes
I can develop detailed shot lists and storyboards
I can create comprehensive production schedules
I can maintain professional project documentation

competencies.raw: Lead production teams and communicate artistic vision
i_can_statements: I can direct actors and crew effectively
I can articulate vision clearly and compellingly
I can manage complex production logistics
I can provide clear direction and feedback

competencies.raw: Present and promote film and television work
i_can_statements: I can present work in formal screening or exhibition contexts
I can create program materials and promotional content
I can discuss work with audiences and critics
I can engage audiences with my creative work

competencies.raw: Communicate meaning and stories through film and television
i_can_statements: I can tell compelling stories through moving image media
I can communicate complex ideas visually
I can create work that resonates with diverse audiences
I can develop distinctive artistic voice

competencies.raw: Explore diverse film and television forms and traditions
i_can_statements: I can create work informed by diverse cinema and television traditions
I can understand global film and television practices
I can respectfully incorporate diverse influences
I can develop contemporary approach informed by tradition

competencies.raw: Engage with film and television as social and cultural commentary
i_can_statements: I can create work addressing social or cultural themes
I can use media to amplify diverse perspectives
I can engage audiences in meaningful conversations
I can understand media's power for social impact
I can create professional portfolio of filmmaking work
I can establish professional networks in media industries
I can seek mentorship and professional guidance
I can build reputation and professional presence

competencies.raw: Plan trajectory toward professional media careers
i_can_statements: I can identify professional goals in media production
I can develop plan for continued skill development
I can explore pathways to professional media work
I can commit to lifelong artistic practice in media

areas.name: Advanced Editing and Post-Production
topics: Advanced color grading and image enhancement
Sound design and audio mixing at professional level

areas.name: Professional Production Practice and Career Development
areas.raw: Professional Production Practice and Career Development
